owner.name: Rohit Kumar Kohli
owner.title: Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer
owner.availability: Yes, available for full-time Full-Stack / Software Engineering roles and internships.
owner.strongestLanguage: Java (90% proficiency, extensively used for core engineering, algorithms, and backend systems).
owner.about: Rohit Kumar Kohli is a Full-Stack Developer & Software Engineer passionate about Java, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Azure, and WebSockets. Proven track record of building production-grade web applications, real-time messaging engines, healthcare portals, and AI-driven ATS tools.

summary.bio: Rohit is a final-year CS undergrad with 8.4 CGPA, multiple software engineering internships (Celebal Tech, SmartBridge, SmartED Innovations, Microsoft Azure simulation), and 3 production full-stack projects.
aiProjects: Doctor Appointment System (Gemini 3.5 Flash AI Symptom Analyzer)
AI Resume Analyzer (ATS scoring and keyword gap engine)
summary.availability: Available for internships and full-time software developer opportunities.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Science & Engineering
education.institution: Graphic Era Hill University / Technical University
education.highlights: Core coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Database Management Systems, Computer Networks, Software Engineering, Object-Oriented Programming in Java.

bullets: Built ETL pipelines processing 120GB of structured data using Azure Databricks and SQL.
Implemented data transformation workflows reducing processing time by 28%.
Created interactive Power BI dashboards for direct stakeholder reporting and insights.
Developed custom ServiceNow applications for IT service management (ITSM) workflows.
Automated incident management pipelines, reducing median resolution time by 35%.
Configured workflow automation, script includes, and business rules using Flow Designer.
Built and deployed 3 full-stack features using the MERN stack for 2,500+ active users.
Designed highly secure RESTful APIs with JWT authentication and role-based access control.
Improved page load performance by 40% through lazy loading, code splitting, and memoization.
Architected a serverless solution using Azure Functions, Blob Storage, and CosmosDB.
Implemented auto-scaling policies on Azure App Services, reducing simulated costs by 15%.
Deployed containerized applications using Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).

projects.title: Doctor Appointment System
projects.tagline: Healthcare platform connecting patients and doctors in real-time
projects.description: A comprehensive healthcare workspace that manages patient-doctor scheduling, processes subscriptions via Razorpay, enables encrypted text consultations with Socket.IO, and provides AI symptom analysis via Gemini 3.5 Flash.
projects.aiDetails: Uses Google Gemini 3.5 Flash API for clinical symptom analysis, urgency classification, and specialist recommendations.

projects.title: AI Resume Analyzer
projects.tagline: ATS-optimized resume scoring and improvement engine
projects.description: An advanced software tool designed to give job-seekers deep keyword gaps analysis, ATS compatibility scoring (0-100), and section-by-section improvement suggestions using AI.
projects.aiDetails: Uses Google Gemini API for ATS document evaluation, entity classification, and keyword gap analysis.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.tagline: MERN Chat with Voice Commands & WebSockets
projects.description: A full-stack communication platform equipped with a Voice Command engine utilizing the Web Speech API, Socket.io WebSockets, dynamic chat rooms, typing indicators, read receipts, and message deletion.
projects.aiDetails: Uses Web Speech API for voice command recognition and Socket.IO for real-time WebSocket messaging.

faqs.question: Which language are you strongest in?
faqs.answer: Rohit is strongest in Java (90% proficiency). He uses Java extensively for core software engineering, data structures & algorithms, object-oriented design, and high-performance backend systems.

faqs.question: Which project uses AI?
faqs.answer:
Two of Rohit's projects use AI:
1. **Doctor Appointment System**: Integrates Google Gemini 3.5 Flash for real-time clinical symptom analysis, urgency classification, and specialist recommendations.
2. **AI Resume Analyzer**: Uses Gemini AI for ATS resume scoring (0-100), section improvement feedback, and keyword gap analysis.

faqs.question: How many projects have you completed?
faqs.answer:
Rohit has completed 3 major production full-stack applications:
1. Doctor Appointment System (Live at https://rohit-healthcare-appointment.vercel.app)
2. AI Resume Analyzer
3. Real-Time Chat Application (Live at https://rohit-chat-app.vercel.app)

faqs.question: Are you available for internships?
faqs.answer: Yes! Rohit is actively available for full-time Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, and Data Engineering roles as well as internships.

faqs.question: Tell me about your LeetCode progress and stats
faqs.answer: Rohit has solved **360 problems** on LeetCode (185 Easy, 160 Medium, 15 Hard) with an active **136-day streak**, 162 total active solving days, and a global ranking of **#363,253** under profile u/Rohit2028.
